name: askntimes
description: Sample judgment on open-ended problems by running the same task through N independent subagents and synthesizing the results.

interface.shortDescription: Sample judgment across N independent agents.
interface.longDescription: Ask N Times adds a reproducible protocol for open-ended judgment tasks: one shared prompt, isolated context, raw result capture, a manifest, and a separate synthesis report.
defaultPrompt: /askntimes estimate the risks in this launch plan
/askntimes --n 5 predict the most likely outcome and explain uncertainty
